signals.reasoning: Keep managing the live MON short. It is back to a healthy profit, retaining about 77% of peak P&L, and the warning pressure has eased enough that this is a real hold rather than a forced exit.
BTC is constructive, but the caution regime and lack of a strong edge keep it in watch mode.
ETH is improving but still not one of the cleanest setups on the sheet.
SOL is one of the better reduced-confidence longs because mechanics are strongly bullish and funding remains supportive for continuation.
DASH remains a valid squeeze-style long because the board is bullish and funding is materially negative, though caution keeps conviction moderated.
CHILLGUY is still extended and crowded, so it stays on watch rather than in the active buy bucket.
ZEC has improving long characteristics, but the setup is not clean enough to outrank SOL or DASH in the caution regime.
MERL has some momentum but not enough structural edge to justify action.
TAO remains one of the cleaner bearish names because trend is still weak even though funding has turned more supportive for a possible bounce.
ZEREBRO still lacks the trade quality and clean edge needed for action here.
ZEN has momentum, but the setup is too noisy to justify a fresh trade.
TNSR has weakened into a cleaner tactical short because both price and mechanics have rolled over.
KAITO remains a valid fade because the board still leans bearish and the bounce profile is weak.
BLUR is messy rather than cleanly directional, so it stays sidelined.
MORPHO does not have enough edge to justify action here.
DYM remains one of the clearest bearish names because mechanics are still firmly negative and the tape has not repaired.
COMP is still a good reduced-confidence long because the mechanical score remains strong and funding is still negative enough to support a squeeze-style continuation.
GRASS has momentum but not enough structural quality to earn a fresh entry.
USTC remains too thin and noisy to be actionable.
STBL remains a clean bearish fade because funding is extremely positive, crowding is high, and the market still looks vulnerable to downside reversal.
